---
name: Workflow request / idea
about: Suggest a new production pattern or improvement for the kit
title: "[IDEA] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What production problem would this solve?**
e.g. "workflows silently retry forever when an API is down."

**What would the workflow do?**
A rough sketch of the trigger, the logic, and where it stores data.

**Would it stay infrastructure-free?**
Can it run on n8n Cloud with Data Tables (no Postgres/Redis)? If not, why is
the extra infrastructure worth it?
